name: My back went out lifting boxes at work but I had issues before, will workers comp cover it in Utah?

mainEntity.name: My back went out lifting boxes at work but I had issues before, will workers comp cover it in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, work aggravation of pre-existing back injury is covered in Utah.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work caused it, even with prior back problems.[3] Insurers often deny claiming prior injury, but job aggravation qualifies for benefits.[3] Key factors: medical records show causation; report promptly; prove work link via doctor notes. Get evaluated by approved providers and gather prior records.[1][3] An attorney can fight denials based on pre-existing issues.

description: Yes, work aggravation of pre-existing back injury is covered in Utah.[3]
